title: [MTR] KTX-1
description: KTX-1 addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the KTX-1 to the game.

Most cars have at least two versions : An "F" version (forwards) and a "B" version (backwards), determining which way the car will be pointed. Additionally, "CC" power cars have the coupler closed, while "CO" versions have it open.

There are three types of cars in the pack:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Power cars (two pantograph heights are provided : 5 blocks and 6 blocks. Please use the one most adapted to your network)
- End cars (passenger cars that are meant to go after the power car, and have a special cone on the top. Two per train)
- Standard cars (1st and 2nd class)

</details>

Couplers are intercompatible with my other TGV packs.

**[Check out my other HSR packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

## Enjoy it!

![KTX-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/826abc87a955b92bcae39f240e37562756f1fefc.jpeg)
